artifacts.name: NPA Repulsion Regulator
artifacts.source: community data (PlayerAuctions guide + Tony Lucente infographic), Jun 2026

perks.desc: Arc armor mods heavily discounted.
Unraveling deals more damage.
On Strand, gaining Woven Mail grants Strand weapons Unraveling Rounds.
Strand-debuffed targets take more Arc and Void ability damage.
Void armor mods heavily discounted.
Boosts Unsated Hunger, Nanotech Tracer Rounds, Harmonic Resonance, Noble Deeds origin traits.
Weapons with those four origin traits are Overcharged.
Arc final blows while Amplified summon a Jolting lightning burst.
Strand armor mods heavily discounted.
On Void, defeating a Void-debuffed target makes a Void Breach.
Picking up a Void Breach grants Void Overshield.
Void Breach pickup makes your next Void damage emit a Weakening pulse.
Melee armor mods heavily discounted.
On Arc, Amplified lasts 20 seconds.
Stunning a Champion grants 1 Armor Charge.
Finishers grant allies your subclass keyword.
Combines Strand Siphon and Arc Siphon mods.
Arc Supers deal 25% more when cast while hurt or Amplified.
Damage resistance while Amplified.
Arc grenade throw boosts grenade regen; Arc kills extend it.

artifacts.name: Queensfoil Censer
artifacts.source: community data (PlayerAuctions guide + Tony Lucente infographic), Jun 2026

perks.desc: Combines Solar/Strand and Solar/Stasis Siphon mods.
Radiant makes Solar weapons apply Scorch.
Rapid Rocket and Grenade Launcher kills grant Armor Charge.
Boosts Sundering, Nano-Munitions, Nanotech Tracer Rockets traits; Overcharges them.
More ability damage to Taken and Scorn.
Rapid Solar precision hits or kills grant Radiant.
While Radiant, more weapon damage to Strand/Stasis-debuffed targets.
Solar Super grants allies Radiant and scales Super damage by allies.
Boosts Noble Deeds, Unsated Hunger, Head Rush, Dragon's Vengeance traits; Overcharges them.
Near-full Super: ability kills spawn Orbs of Power.
Orb pickup grants Strand weapons Unraveling Rounds.
Defeating encased combatants spawns Stasis crystals.
Solar ability damage weakens Champions and bosses.
Strand/Stasis weapon shield-breaks can Suspend or Freeze.
Damaging Unraveled targets can spawn a Threadling.
Shattering crystals deals more damage and releases slowing shards.
While Radiant, Solar precision kills Ignite.
Arc Supers deal 25% more when cast while hurt or Amplified.
More damage when alone in your fireteam.
Rocket fire consumes Armor Charge for more damage and reload.

artifacts.name: Hunter's Journal
artifacts.source: community data (PlayerAuctions guide + Tony Lucente infographic), Jun 2026

perks.desc: Radiolaria Transposer weapons deal more to Vex; longer pools.
Dealer's Choice, Radiolaria Transposer, Collective Purpose, Sundering weapons Overcharged.
Elemental Charge costs 1 energy.
Cast no Shadows rounds can overflow the magazine.
Dealer's Choice weapons trigger Solar explosions on rapid/precision kills.
Scavenger mods cost 1 energy.
Charged Up costs 1 energy.
Multikills matching your Super element make a matching pickup; Kinetic works too.
Stasis kills on slowed/frozen targets release a slowing burst.
Shield-breaks grant weapon stability, handling, reload; Swords gain guard.
Strand-detonated Tangles explode larger.
Solar Sniper precision hits Scorch.
Consecutive Auto Rifle hits grant 40% damage reduction.
Stunning a Champion grants 30% energy to your least-charged ability.
Sword triple kills refund three ammo (PvE).
On Void/Prismatic, defeating weakened targets grants a small Void Overshield.
On Solar/Prismatic, Orb pickup makes you Radiant.
30% damage resistance while Amplified (Arc/Prismatic).
Ignitions deal more damage in a larger radius.
Auto Rifle kills reload and boost Auto Rifle damage.
Super grants allies with non-matching Supers a damage buff.
Sword damage consumes Armor Charge for a stacking damage buff.
Void sources deal more to weakened targets.
Woven Mail/Frost Armor/Void Overshield boosts melee; Amplified/Radiant boosts grenade.
More grenade/melee damage while transcendent; kills refund Light/Dark.
Sniper hits grant stacking Sniper damage, stability, reload.
On Arc/Prismatic, Amplified Arc kills explode and Jolt.

artifacts.name: Tablet of Ruin
artifacts.source: community data (PlayerAuctions guide + Tony Lucente infographic), Jun 2026

perks.desc: Amplified or Bolt Charge boosts Arc weapon handling and reload.
Subjugation weapons gain stability/reload on hit; Overcharged.
Rapid Void precision hits/kills grant Volatile Rounds.
Timelost Magazine weapons gain bonus damage; Overcharged.
Orb or Tangle pickup grants Strand weapons Unraveling Rounds.
Rapid Trace Rifle kills heal you and allies.
While surrounded, Machine Guns/Glaives gain reload; kills heal.
Defeating Arc-debuffed targets grants Bolt Charge; upgrade spawns Orbs and heals.
Defeating powerful Taken loads 3 Taken seekers (Disrupt/Exhaust).
Exhaust and Sever are stronger.
Arc-killing Exhausted/Severed targets releases a blinding burst.
Rapid Kinetic/Super-matching kills make a matching pickup; grants Super energy.
Finishers on powerful combatants spawn Special ammo.
Rapid Volatile makes your next Void damage emit a Weakening pulse.
Max Bolt Charge makes you Amplified; bolts deal more.
Damaging Unraveled targets can spawn a Threadling.
Rapid Glaive melee kills grant Glaive ammo; blocking boosts melee.
Trace Rifles deal more to targets with matching elemental debuff.
Fusion/Linear damage debuffs target for more incoming damage; reloads.
Killing Exhausted/Severed targets with Super-element weapons grants Super energy.
Sustained MG/Rocket damage grants DR and ability regen.
Stunning a Champion grants max Bolt Charge; heals and Jolts.
Void kills on Weakened targets apply Volatile nearby.
Casting Super while hurt or with matching elemental buff boosts Super damage.

artifacts.name: Slayer Baron Apothecary Satchel

perks.desc: Frost Armor boosts Stasis weapon reload/stability; Swords gain guard.
Rapid kills grant mobility; Dark Ether Reaper triggers faster.
Dark Ether Reaper can spawn bonus charge; Overcharged.
3% more to Scorn; Shadestalker stacks it.
Grenade Launcher damage boosts GL reload.
Rapid Trace Rifle kills heal you and allies.
Emergency Reinforcement consumes all but 1 Armor Charge.
Rapid Stasis precision hits grant Frost Armor.
Stasis Shards make your next Stasis melee spawn crystals.
Finishers grant 25% DR; 2+ Shadestalker also heals.
Multikills on Weakened targets grant Devour.
Rapid hits/kills on Arc-debuffed foes spawn an Ionic Trace.
Rapid kills while surrounded grant Armor Charge.
Grabbing multiple ammo bricks grants 1 Armor Charge.
With Frost Armor, critical damage emits a freezing burst.
Shattering crystals releases slowing shards.
Finishers emit a wave matching your Super element.
Grenade Launchers Weaken (15%) bosses and Champions.
Rapid Arc precision hits consume Armor Charge to Blind.
First shield-break makes an Orb of Power.
While Devour, Void kills can spawn a Void Breach.
Frozen enemies emit slowing fog; Dark Ether Reaper does more to frozen.
Void Breach pickup makes your next Void damage emit a 15% Weaken wave.
Dark Ether Reaper and Arc/Void abilities do more to Stasis-afflicted.
Stasis Shards grant class ability energy; Void Breaches grant melee.
Five GL hits on a target trigger a stunning shockwave.
Arc sources deal 15% more to Blind targets.
After a Void Breach, Void weapon damage rains seeking projectiles.

artifacts.name: Implement of Curiosity

perks.desc: Unlocks Solar/Strand and Solar/Stasis helmet siphons at 3 energy each.
Scavenger mods cost 1 energy.
Frost Armor boosts Stasis weapon reload/stability; Swords gain guard.
Woven Mail grants increased Super and Grenade stats.
Rapid Scout precision hits/kills grant reload and flinch resist.
Rapid Solar precision grants Radiant; Stasis precision grants Frost Armor.
Granting allies elemental buffs restores class ability energy.
With Frost Armor, critical damage freezes nearby and grants allies Frost Armor.
Rapid non-Sidearm kills boost Sidearm damage on next draw.
Matching elemental pickup grants energy to least-charged ability.
Strand-destroyed Tangles explode larger.
Stasis/Strand non-bosses take more Solar damage.
Stunning a Champion with an elemental weapon emits a matching debuff explosion.
Sustained precision damage near 2+ allies grants DR.
Kills can make an elemental pickup matching your Super.
While Radiant, sustained damage fires Scorching Solar projectiles.
Woven Mail/Frost Armor/Void Overshield boosts melee; Amplified/Radiant boosts grenade.
Elemental pickup or Tangle boosts same-element weapon damage.
Tangle from a Strand-debuffed kill suspends nearby.
With Frost Armor, Stasis precision kills emit a freezing burst.
